name: Web Task Dashboard

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Minimal changes to make Obsidian-Bot happy. I want to publish this plugin in the official repository.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mbedded/obsidian-web-task-dashboard/compare/1.0.0...1.0.1
releases.name: Release 1.0.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
First release of this plugin.

### Features
- Initial release of this plugin.
- Localization added for DE and EN.
- Basic functionality to show contexts and tasks. Tasks can be created, deleted and marked as done.
- Only [Tracks](https://github.com/TracksApp/tracks) is currently supported.

### CI
-  Setup of a CI pipeline using Github-Actions.
releases.name: Release 1.0.0
